examples: Wendy saw the shadow on the floor, looking so draggled, and she was frightfully sorry for Peter.
When the young wrens heard that, they were frightfully angry, and screamed, "No, that we are not!"
Born in Israel and reared in Boston, she is frightfully antipress and unabashedly tough on customers.
The expected 10% correction happened frightfully fast, which means the slide might not be finished.
